title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Sanji, Unknown person #2, Franky, Nami, Unknown person #3 as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's fighting in the realm of the dead too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's big, even by giant standards.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've got a thick layer of fat under the skin, so prep takes a while... but simmer it in booze, and it's fantastic!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We didn't bring any alcohol though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Hunter's cabin is stocked with all the cooking tools we'll need.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's grab some herbs on the way back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nevermind that, what is this thing? Is a devil fruit responsible?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So, it's just like Zeus, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yeah, he's our Navigator's Lockey now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're saying they did this to you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All your rampaging overseas must've made you some enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'd already be King of the World...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I'd gone far enough to cross paths with guys like that.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
